case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. VICTORIA GOLOVINA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED APR-29-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLOVINA, VICTORIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLOVINA, VICTORIA $5,578.29 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,803.29, DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $134.96 DUE ON THE 30TH DAY OF EACH MONTH. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLOVINA, VICTORIA
DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GOLOVINA, VICTORIA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-2014
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLOVINA, VICTORIA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,754.60 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 16217053) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GOLOVINA, VICTORIA
